options: A. T1486 – Data Encrypted for Impact
B. T1027 – Obfuscated Files or Information
C. T1140 – Deobfuscate/Decode Files or Information
D. No clear evidence of T1486; only generic obfuscation/decryption is shown.
E. T1565 – Data Manipulation

question.topic: C2 encryption vs impact encryption (GandCrab4 loader sample)

B. T1486 – Data Encrypted for Impact only, because any ransomware family implies this.
C. Both T1486 and T1573.001 are clearly supported.
D. Neither T1573.001 nor T1486 are supported; only generic T1027 is evidenced.
